---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, integration, or operator surface.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

What gap or pain point does this proposal address? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Outline the capability, integration, or surface change you would like to see.
If it touches an external platform (Suno, X / Bird, Instagram, TikTok,
distribution rails), describe the authority model and live-go boundary you
expect.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why this one is preferable.

## Boundary checklist

- [ ] No real publishing of media without explicit operator approval
- [ ] No bypass of dry-run / live-go arming gates
- [ ] No new credential storage paths inside markdown ledgers
- [ ] No additional `postinstall` lifecycle behaviour
- [ ] Compatible with the existing audit log safe field list

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, related issues, or supporting material.
